title: Vanilla Plus ++
description: Basic vanilla with all the features of Optifine and a few personal tweaks
body:
# About
This is a modpack that slightly tweaks vanilla Minecraft. It improves the FPS significantly and adds many quality of life features from Optifine such as connected textures and dynamic lights. It also add several mods which change the game somewhat drastically such as Freecam and Replay Mod. The pack aslo includes some shaders and resourcepacks.

# Mod List
### Mods
- Configured Defaults 
- Puzzle 
- Sodium 
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) 
- Xaero's Minimap 
- BetterGrassify 
- Fabric API 
- Entity Culling 
- Xaero's World Map 
- Fabric Language Kotlin 
- WorldEdit 
- Capes 
- Litematica 
- [EMF] Entity Model Features 
- OptiGUI 
- ImmediatelyFast 
- Freecam 
- BetterF3 
- Cloth Config API 
- Reese's Sodium Options 
- lazy-language-loader 
- Krypton 
- MidnightLib 
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric) 
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features 
- TCDCommons API 
- No Telemetry 
- Iris Shaders 
- Cubes Without Borders 
- MaLiLib 
- Sodium Extra 
- More Culling 
- Better Clouds 
- Zoomify 
- FerriteCore 
- Sodium Dynamic Lights (Now have Lamb Dynamic Lights) 
- Continuity 
- Polytone 
- Dynamic FPS 
- Better Statistics Screen 
- Mod Menu 
- ReplayMod 
- Text Placeholder API 
- Lithium 
- Architectury API

### Resource Packs
- Jerm's Better Leaves
- Bountiful Crops (only in 1.3.1+)

### Shaders
- Mellow
